name: food-waste-management-mern
description: MERN monorepo for Food Waste Management System with web and mobile frontends

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix apps/mobile && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:mobile"
